# DJ Zen Eyer - Official Website (Technical & Career Summary)

DJ Zen Eyer is a 2x World Champion Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer, known for his innovative style and contribution to the global dance scene.

## Core Information
- **Name:** Zen Eyer (Marcelo Eyer)
- **Roles:** DJ, Music Producer, Technical Full-stack Engineer.
- **Achievements:** 2x Brazilian Zouk World Champion DJ.
- **Expertise:** Music Production (Ableton, Logic), Brazilian Zouk history (BZC), Web Development (React, WordPress Headless).

## Key Website Sections
- **Home:** [https://djzeneyer.com/](https://djzeneyer.com/)
- **About:** [https://djzeneyer.com/about](https://djzeneyer.com/about) (Career history & bio)
- **Events:** [https://djzeneyer.com/events](https://djzeneyer.com/events) (Tour dates and schedules)
- **Music:** [https://djzeneyer.com/music](https://djzeneyer.com/music) (Exclusive remixes, singles, and albums)
- **Shop:** [https://djzeneyer.com/shop](https://djzeneyer.com/shop) (Digital products and official merch)
- **Zen Tribe:** [https://djzeneyer.com/zentribe](https://djzeneyer.com/zentribe) (Community and membership)
- **Press Kit:** [https://djzeneyer.com/work-with-me](https://djzeneyer.com/work-with-me) (Technical rider, booking, and bio)

## Developer Resources & API
- **AI Data Endpoint:** [https://djzeneyer.com/wp-json/djz/v1/ai-data](https://djzeneyer.com/wp-json/djz/v1/ai-data) (Aggregated data for LLMs)
- **REST API:** [https://djzeneyer.com/wp-json/wp/v2/](https://djzeneyer.com/wp-json/wp/v2/) (Standard WordPress endpoints)
